title: buckleya lanceolata
intro: Buckleya lanceolata, also known as the "Gastrodia-like plant" or "Chinese snake grass," is a type of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. Traditionally, Buckleya lanceolata has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, Buckleya lanceolata is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its availability and use may vary due to its limited cultivation and potential toxicity.
